body:
## Summary
- **Debt thresholds**: Tier 1 (< $0): OPEX +20%, revenue -10%. Tier 2 (< -$2000): node bandwidth degradation. Tier 3 (< -$5000): random non-core link severed
- **Recovery tools**: Sell non-core nodes ($150 refund), sell links ($75 refund), one-time emergency loan (+$5000, costs $500/min for 5 min)
- **UI**: TopBar money pulses red in debt with tier indicator, Emergency Loan button at < -$1000, Sidebar sell buttons for non-core assets
- **God mode**: Disables all debt penalties
- **8 new unit tests** covering debt tiers, loan mechanics, sell actions, core protection, state reset

## Test plan
- [ ] All 25 tests pass (`npx vitest run`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Manual: go negative → verify red pulse, debt warnings in log
- [ ] Manual: hit -$2000 → verify node degradation
- [ ] Manual: hit -$5000 → verify link severance
- [ ] Manual: sell node/link via sidebar → verify refund
- [ ] Manual: use emergency loan → verify one-time use
- [ ] Manual: god mode → verify no penalties

Closes #145
title: feat: debt escalation & recovery system (closes #145)
